## Objective

Describe the document or record that needs to be created or updated.

## Source of Truth

Link the ticket, decision, or evidence source.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The document is clear enough for technical due diligence.
- [ ] Placeholders are explicit where information is unknown.
- [ ] No vendor, account, or product assumptions were invented.
- [ ] Related ownership or security records were updated if affected.

## Review Notes

Add anything reviewers should verify.
